name: @ce-net/tabnet
description: Run a large LLM sharded across many ordinary browser tabs (laptops and phones), coordinated so it is dead simple: open a URL, lend a tab. Pipeline-parallel inference over WebGPU, coordinated by a Cloudflare Durable Object, built on CE browser nodes.
author: Leif Rydenfalk <ledamecrydenfalk@gmail.com>
//: The browser parts (web/) are dependency-free vanilla JS + WebGPU and need NO build step. The coordinator (coordinator/) is a Cloudflare Worker + Durable Object; its only dev dependency is wrangler, installed on demand, never required to open the pages.
